---
title: "Contact"
---

::: {.content-section}

## Get in Touch

We welcome inquiries from prospective students, collaborators, and anyone interested in our research.

---

::: {.contact-info}

### Principal Investigator

**Gal Ziv, PhD**  
Email: [gal.ziv@lsu.lt](mailto:gal.ziv@lsu.lt)

### Lab Address

LSU Skill Acquisition Lab
Lithuanian Sports University (https://www.lsu.lt/)
Sporto g. 6
Kaunas
Lithuania
Email: [lsumotorlab@gmail.com](mailto:lsumotorlab@gmail.com)

:::

::: {.map-container}
<iframe src="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=Lithuanian+Sports+University,+Sporto+g.+6,+Kaunas,+Lithuania&output=embed" width="100%" height="400" style="border:0;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe>
:::

:::
